extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against the entities: I counted only the “Against our Company” and “Against our Directors” rows, yielding criminal 0 (Nil + Nil), statutory/regulatory 1 (Nil + 1), and tax 0 (Nil + Nil); the “By our Company” row, including 5 tax proceedings and ₹7.76 million, was excluded, as were all director matters for the aggregate company/subsidiary amount. No quantified amount is disclosed for matters against the Company or any subsidiary, so the aggregate litigation amount against the consolidated group is null. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹7.76 million as at September 30, 2024, converted from million to ₹0.776 crore (₹7.76 million ÷ 10). The source currency unit is ₹ million; no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed, and the disclosed percentages relate to income streams or a stock-broking segment rather than customers.
